Add Custom Rule

Upstream DNS Servers

System Deployment Instructions

To enable AuraBlock system-wide on this Linux device, DNS queries must be pointed to 127.0.0.1.

1. Systemd Service

An installer script is provided at the root of the project. Run it to install AuraBlock as a daemon:

sudo ./install.sh

2. Configure Linux DNS

If using NetworkManager, modify your active connection to use DNS 127.0.0.1, or update /etc/resolv.conf:

nameserver 127.0.0.1

Tip: If Tailscale is active, DNS resolves via tailscale. You can configure custom DNS settings in the Tailscale console to point to this local machine's IP address.
